temporal_description: A medium shot shows a group of men in what appears to be an investigation briefing room. In the foreground, a man in a light blue, short-sleeved shirt looks down with a concerned expression. Behind him, another man in a similar shirt stands with his hands clasped. To the left, a whiteboard covered in notes and photos is visible. On the right, several framed photos with blue-tinted images are displayed on an easel. The on-screen text "风行网" is visible in the upper left corner. The camera pans slightly to the left, revealing more of the room. A man in a dark suit and white shirt stands in the center, looking forward with a serious expression. To his left, another man in a suit is partially visible. The whiteboard and photos remain in the background. The camera pans further left, focusing on a man in a dark jacket over a light blue shirt. He looks intently forward with a worried expression. Other people, including a woman in a white shirt, are visible in the background, all looking in the same direction. The "风行网" text is still present. A man speaks in a serious and informative tone, as if presenting evidence or a theory in a professional setting. His voice is steady and clear, conveying a sense of authority and focus as he states, "照说一个钟头之后，他会跟一个泰国的卖家交易。" (According to the report, an hour later, he would be trading with a Thai seller.) The background is quiet, with no music or distracting sound effects, placing all the emphasis on the speaker's important information. The scene cuts to a wider shot of the room. A man in a dark suit stands at the front, holding papers and addressing the group. In the foreground, a person in a blue jacket with "CT" on the back is seated, looking up at the speaker. Another man in a light blue shirt stands to the left, observing the presentation. The background consists of a large green wall with a map or diagram pinned to it. The "风行网" text remains in the upper left corner.
